name: Roux Table Lamp - 19.5 Inch Height - TBL4513 - Black - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the Roux table lamp, a stylish addition to any home decor. Standing at 19.5 inches, this elegant lamp features a sleek black ceramic base that blends seamlessly with modern and classic interiors alike. The cotton shade offers a soft diffusion of light, creating a warm and welcoming ambiance in any room. Crafted with ceramic and iron, the Roux lamp is designed to add a touch of sophistication to your living space. Whether it's placed in the living room, bedroom, or study, this lamp makes a statement without overpowering your decor. Embrace simplicity and elegance with the Roux ceramic table lamp and enhance your home with its timeless appeal.
